title: Smoky Maple Wrap
description: A savory and sweet wrap filled with smoky chicken and topped with maple syrup.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the smoky chicken breast with salt, pepper, and your favorite spices.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
Meanwhile, toast the monsoon wrap on the grill or in a toaster.
Assemble the wrap by spreading the Slovakian coleslaw on the bottom half of the wrap.
Add the sliced Slovakian dill pickles on top of the coleslaw.
Slice the grilled chicken breast and add it on top of the pickles.
Drizzle the maple syrup over the chicken.
Sprinkle chopped fresh cilantro over the top.
Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling.
